one_line_description: Customer data and marketing automation platform for email/SMS, with rich APIs for profiles, events, campaigns, and flows.
auth_summary: Server-side APIs authenticate via a private API key (pk_-prefixed, sent as 'Authorization: Klaviyo-API-Key ...') with configurable scopes, or via OAuth2 bearer tokens (required for App Marketplace apps, better rate limits); a public API key/site ID is used only for client-side endpoints.
access_notes: Fully self-serve: generate private API keys in account settings (free Klaviyo tier available); OAuth apps are created via Klaviyo's developer portal. Marketplace listing has a review, but API credentials themselves are unrestricted.
api_surface_summary: Versioned JSON:API REST surface covering profiles, lists, segments, events/metrics, campaigns, flows, templates, catalogs, coupons, and reporting.
agent_notes: Klaviyo has a first-class official MCP server (GA since Aug 2025, local + remote variants) documented in its developer docs — one of the most mature official MCPs in this category. Klaviyo is actively steering marketplace apps toward OAuth over private keys.
